= pi


Returns the value of the mathematical constant Pi.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.radians = this.degrees * (pi() / 180)

# In:  {"degrees":45}
# Out: {"radians":0.7853981633974483}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.degrees = this.radians * (180 / pi())

# In:  {"radians":0.78540}
# Out: {"degrees":45.00010522957486}
----
